<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width,initial-scale=1.0">
<title>Thato Xauka — Full-Stack Developer & Android Engineer</title>
<meta name="description" content="Computer Science student | Full-Stack Web Developer | Android Engineer | MySQL | South Africa">
<style>
*,*::before,*::after{margin:0;padding:0;box-sizing:border-box;}
html{scroll-behavior:smooth;}
body{background:#04090f;color:#e8edf2;font-family:'Segoe UI',Arial,sans-serif;font-size:16px;line-height:1.7;overflow-x:hidden;}
::-webkit-scrollbar{width:4px;}
::-webkit-scrollbar-track{background:#04090f;}
::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb{background:#00c6ff;border-radius:2px;}
::selection{background:rgba(0,198,255,0.2);}

/* ── VARIABLES ── */
:root{
  --cyan:#00c6ff; --cyan2:#009ec7; --purple:#7c3aed; --green:#10b981;
  --orange:#f59e0b; --bg:#04090f; --bg2:#080f18; --bg3:#0d1623;
  --card:#0a1422; --border:rgba(0,198,255,0.12); --border2:rgba(0,198,255,0.28);
  --muted:rgba(232,237,242,0.55); --dim:rgba(232,237,242,0.25);
}

/* ── MESH BG ── */
body::before{content:'';position:fixed;inset:0;
  background:radial-gradient(ellipse 80% 50% at 20% 20%,rgba(0,198,255,0.05) 0%,transparent 60%),
             radial-gradient(ellipse 60% 60% at 80% 80%,rgba(124,58,237,0.05) 0%,transparent 60%);
  pointer-events:none;z-index:0;}

/* ── NAV ── */
nav{position:fixed;top:0;left:0;right:0;z-index:1000;display:flex;align-items:center;
  justify-content:space-between;padding:0 44px;height:64px;
  background:rgba(4,9,15,0.95);border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);backdrop-filter:blur(16px);}
.nav-brand{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;text-decoration:none;}
.nav-brand img{width:38px;height:38px;border-radius:8px;object-fit:cover;border:1px solid var(--border2);}
.nav-brand-name{font-size:15px;font-weight:700;color:#fff;letter-spacing:.5px;}
.nav-brand-name span{color:var(--cyan);}
.nav-links{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:28px;list-style:none;}
.nav-links a{color:var(--muted);text-decoration:none;font-size:12px;font-weight:700;
  letter-spacing:1px;text-transform:uppercase;transition:color .2s;}
.nav-links a:hover{color:var(--cyan);}
.nav-hire{background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--cyan),var(--purple));color:#fff;
  padding:8px 20px;border-radius:6px;text-decoration:none;font-size:12px;font-weight:700;
  letter-spacing:1px;transition:opacity .2s;}
.nav-hire:hover{opacity:.88;}
.hbg{display:none;flex-direction:column;gap:5px;background:none;border:none;cursor:pointer;}
.hbg span{width:22px;height:2px;background:#fff;border-radius:2px;display:block;transition:all .3s;}

/* ── HERO ── */
#hero{min-height:100vh;display:flex;align-items:center;padding:80px 44px 60px;
  position:relative;z-index:1;}
#hero::before{content:'';position:absolute;inset:0;
  background-image:radial-gradient(rgba(0,198,255,0.14) 1px,transparent 1px);
  background-size:44px 44px;
  mask-image:radial-gradient(ellipse 90% 90% at 50% 50%,black 40%,transparent 100%);}
.hero-inner{max-width:1160px;margin:0 auto;width:100%;display:grid;
  grid-template-columns:1fr auto;gap:60px;align-items:center;position:relative;z-index:2;}

.hero-status{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;
  background:rgba(16,185,129,.1);border:1px solid rgba(16,185,129,.3);
  color:#34d399;padding:5px 15px;border-radius:30px;font-size:11px;font-weight:700;
  letter-spacing:2px;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:22px;}
.status-dot{width:7px;height:7px;background:#34d399;border-radius:50%;animation:pulse 2s infinite;}
@keyframes pulse{0%,100%{opacity:1;transform:scale(1)}50%{opacity:.4;transform:scale(1.5)}}

.hero-greeting{font-size:17px;color:var(--cyan);font-weight:600;margin-bottom:6px;font-family:monospace;}
.hero-name{font-size:clamp(46px,6vw,84px);font-weight:900;line-height:.95;
  letter-spacing:-1px;margin-bottom:12px;color:#fff;}
.hero-name .grad{background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--cyan),var(--purple));
  -webkit-background-clip:text;-webkit-text-fill-color:transparent;background-clip:text;display:block;}
.hero-role{font-size:18px;color:var(--muted);margin-bottom:26px;}
.hero-role strong{color:var(--cyan);}
.hero-bio{font-size:15px;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.9;max-width:500px;margin-bottom:34px;}
.hero-bio strong{color:#fff;}

.hero-btns{display:flex;gap:12px;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-bottom:40px;}
.btn-grad{background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--cyan),var(--purple));color:#fff;
  padding:13px 26px;border-radius:8px;text-decoration:none;font-size:14px;font-weight:700;
  display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:7px;transition:all .2s;}
.btn-grad:hover{transform:translateY(-2px);box-shadow:0 8px 28px rgba(0,198,255,.28);}
.btn-out{background:transparent;color:#fff;padding:13px 26px;border-radius:8px;
  border:1px solid var(--border2);text-decoration:none;font-size:14px;font-weight:600;
  display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:7px;transition:all .2s;}
.btn-out:hover{border-color:var(--cyan);color:var(--cyan);}

.hero-socials{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;}
.soc-lbl{font-size:11px;color:var(--dim);letter-spacing:1px;text-transform:uppercase;margin-right:4px;}
.soc-a{width:40px;height:40px;border-radius:9px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.04);
  border:1px solid var(--border);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
  font-size:17px;text-decoration:none;transition:all .2s;}
.soc-a:hover{border-color:var(--cyan);background:rgba(0,198,255,.08);transform:translateY(-2px);}

/* photo ring */
.photo-wrap{position:relative;flex-shrink:0;}
.photo-ring{width:320px;height:320px;border-radius:50%;padding:3px;
  background:conic-gradient(from 0deg,var(--cyan),var(--purple),#10b981,var(--cyan));
  animation:spin 8s linear infinite;}
@keyframes spin{to{transform:rotate(360deg)}}
.photo-inner{width:100%;height:100%;border-radius:50%;background:var(--bg);overflow:hidden;}
.photo-inner img{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;border-radius:50%;}
.photo-badge{position:absolute;bottom:10px;right:-8px;background:var(--card);
  border:1px solid var(--border2);border-radius:11px;padding:9px 14px;
  display:flex;align-items:center;gap:9px;backdrop-filter:blur(10px);}
.pb-icon{font-size:20px;}
.pb-lbl{font-size:10px;color:var(--muted);letter-spacing:1px;text-transform:uppercase;}
.pb-val{font-size:12px;font-weight:700;color:var(--cyan);}
.photo-badge2{position:absolute;top:18px;left:-18px;background:var(--card);
  border:1px solid rgba(124,58,237,.3);border-radius:11px;padding:9px 14px;}
.pb2-val{font-size:12px;font-weight:700;color:#a78bfa;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;}

/* ── SECTIONS ── */
section{padding:92px 44px;position:relative;z-index:1;}
.container{max-width:1160px;margin:0 auto;}
.sec-eyebrow{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;font-family:monospace;font-size:11px;
  color:var(--cyan);letter-spacing:3px;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:10px;}
.sec-eyebrow::before{content:'';width:28px;height:1px;background:var(--cyan);}
.sec-title{font-size:clamp(30px,4vw,50px);font-weight:900;letter-spacing:-.5px;margin-bottom:12px;color:#fff;}
.sec-sub{color:var(--muted);font-size:15px;max-width:520px;line-height:1.8;}

/* ── SKILLS ── */
#skills{background:var(--bg2);}
.skills-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:20px;margin-top:50px;}
.skill-cat{background:var(--card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:15px;
  padding:26px;transition:border-color .2s;}
.skill-cat:hover{border-color:var(--border2);}
.skill-cat-icon{font-size:26px;margin-bottom:10px;}
.skill-cat-title{font-size:14px;font-weight:700;color:#fff;margin-bottom:5px;}
.skill-cat-desc{font-size:12px;color:var(--muted);margin-bottom:16px;line-height:1.6;}
.stags{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:7px;}
.stag{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:5px;background:rgba(0,198,255,.06);
  border:1px solid rgba(0,198,255,.15);color:var(--cyan);padding:4px 11px;
  border-radius:5px;font-size:11px;font-weight:600;font-family:monospace;transition:all .2s;}
.stag:hover{background:rgba(0,198,255,.12);}
.stag.p{background:rgba(124,58,237,.08);border-color:rgba(124,58,237,.2);color:#a78bfa;}
.stag.g{background:rgba(16,185,129,.08);border-color:rgba(16,185,129,.2);color:#34d399;}
.stag.o{background:rgba(245,158,11,.08);border-color:rgba(245,158,11,.2);color:#fbbf24;}
.tl{width:15px;height:15px;border-radius:3px;display:inline-flex;align-items:center;
  justify-content:center;font-size:10px;font-weight:900;font-style:normal;flex-shrink:0;}

/* AI card */
.ai-card{background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(124,58,237,.1),rgba(0,198,255,.04));
  border:1px solid rgba(124,58,237,.3);border-radius:15px;padding:26px;
  grid-column:1/-1;position:relative;overflow:hidden;}
.ai-card::before{content:'';position:absolute;top:-40px;right:-40px;width:180px;height:180px;
  background:radial-gradient(circle,rgba(124,58,237,.15),transparent 70%);}
.ai-badge{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:5px;
  background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--purple),var(--cyan));color:#fff;
  padding:3px 11px;border-radius:18px;font-size:10px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:1px;margin-bottom:10px;}
.ai-title{font-size:17px;font-weight:900;color:#fff;margin-bottom:5px;}
.ai-desc{font-size:13px;color:var(--muted);max-width:680px;line-height:1.8;margin-bottom:14px;}
.ai-tags{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:7px;}
.ai-tag{background:rgba(124,58,237,.1);border:1px solid rgba(124,58,237,.2);
  color:#a78bfa;padding:3px 11px;border-radius:4px;font-size:11px;}

/* ── PROJECTS ── */
#projects{background:var(--bg);}
.proj-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr);gap:20px;margin-top:50px;}
.proj-card{background:var(--card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:15px;
  overflow:hidden;display:flex;flex-direction:column;transition:all .25s;position:relative;}
.proj-card:hover{border-color:var(--border2);transform:translateY(-5px);
  box-shadow:0 18px 50px rgba(0,0,0,.4);}
.proj-card.feat{border-color:rgba(0,198,255,.24);}
.proj-thumb{height:190px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
  font-size:52px;position:relative;overflow:hidden;}
.thumb-dots{position:absolute;inset:0;
  background-image:radial-gradient(rgba(0,198,255,.1) 1px,transparent 1px);
  background-size:22px 22px;}
.t-android{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#0d1a10,#0a2015);}
.t-web{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#0d1623,#0a1f35);}
.t-db{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#120d1f,#1a0d2e);}
.t-ent{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#0d1623,#150d23);}
.feat-badge{position:absolute;top:11px;left:11px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#f59e0b,#f97316);
  color:#fff;padding:3px 10px;border-radius:4px;font-size:10px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:1px;}
.type-badge{position:absolute;top:11px;right:11px;background:rgba(0,0,0,.6);
  border:1px solid var(--border2);color:var(--cyan);padding:3px 10px;border-radius:4px;
  font-size:10px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:1px;backdrop-filter:blur(8px);}
.proj-body{padding:22px;flex:1;display:flex;flex-direction:column;}
.proj-title{font-size:17px;font-weight:900;color:#fff;margin-bottom:5px;}
.proj-desc{font-size:12px;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.7;margin-bottom:14px;flex:1;}
.proj-stack{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:5px;margin-bottom:16px;}
.ptag{background:rgba(255,255,255,.05);border:1px solid var(--border);
  color:var(--dim);padding:2px 8px;border-radius:3px;font-size:10px;font-family:monospace;}
.proj-links{display:flex;gap:9px;}
.proj-link{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:5px;padding:7px 13px;
  border-radius:6px;text-decoration:none;font-size:11px;font-weight:700;transition:all .2s;
  background:rgba(0,198,255,.08);border:1px solid rgba(0,198,255,.2);color:var(--cyan);}
.proj-link:hover{background:rgba(0,198,255,.15);border-color:var(--cyan);}
.proj-link.gh{background:rgba(255,255,255,.05);border-color:var(--border);color:var(--muted);}
.proj-link.gh:hover{border-color:var(--border2);color:#fff;}

/* ── EDUCATION ── */
#education{background:var(--bg2);}
.edu-card{background:var(--card);border:1px solid rgba(0,198,255,.2);
  border-radius:15px;padding:30px;position:relative;overflow:hidden;
  background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(0,198,255,.03),var(--card));max-width:650px;}
.edu-card::before{content:'';position:absolute;top:-28px;right:-28px;width:110px;height:110px;
  background:radial-gradient(circle,rgba(0,198,255,.08),transparent 70%);}
.edu-year{display:inline-block;background:rgba(0,198,255,.1);border:1px solid rgba(0,198,255,.2);
  color:var(--cyan);padding:3px 12px;border-radius:4px;font-size:11px;font-weight:700;
  letter-spacing:1px;margin-bottom:12px;}
.edu-degree{font-size:20px;font-weight:900;color:#fff;margin-bottom:4px;}
.edu-inst{font-size:14px;color:var(--cyan);font-weight:600;margin-bottom:16px;}
.edu-modules{list-style:none;}
.edu-modules li{font-size:13px;color:var(--muted);padding:5px 0;
  border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.04);display:flex;gap:8px;}
.edu-modules li::before{content:"◆";color:var(--cyan);font-size:8px;margin-top:5px;flex-shrink:0;}

/* ── ABOUT ── */
#about{background:var(--bg);}
.about-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:68px;align-items:start;}
.about-photo-frame{border-radius:15px;overflow:hidden;border:1px solid var(--border2);}
.about-photo-frame img{width:100%;display:block;border-radius:15px;}
.about-stats{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:10px;margin-top:14px;}
.astat{background:var(--card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:11px;
  padding:14px;text-align:center;}
.astat-num{font-size:24px;font-weight:900;color:var(--cyan);}
.astat-lbl{font-size:10px;color:var(--muted);letter-spacing:1px;text-transform:uppercase;margin-top:2px;}
.about-text p{color:var(--muted);line-height:1.9;margin-bottom:14px;font-size:14px;}
.about-text strong{color:#fff;}
.lang-tags{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:7px;margin-top:7px;}
.lang-tag{background:rgba(16,185,129,.08);border:1px solid rgba(16,185,129,.2);
  color:#34d399;padding:4px 13px;border-radius:18px;font-size:11px;font-weight:600;}
.avail-box{background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(16,185,129,.1),rgba(0,198,255,.04));
  border:1px solid rgba(16,185,129,.24);border-radius:11px;padding:16px 18px;
  margin-top:22px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:13px;}
.avail-dot{width:9px;height:9px;background:var(--green);border-radius:50%;
  animation:pulse 2s infinite;flex-shrink:0;}
.avail-title{font-size:13px;font-weight:700;color:#fff;}
.avail-sub{font-size:11px;color:var(--muted);}

/* ── CONTACT ── */
#contact{background:var(--bg2);}
.contact-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:60px;align-items:start;}
.c-items{margin-top:26px;}
.c-item{display:flex;gap:15px;margin-bottom:20px;align-items:flex-start;}
.c-icon{width:42px;height:42px;background:rgba(0,198,255,.08);border:1px solid rgba(0,198,255,.2);
  border-radius:9px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:17px;flex-shrink:0;}
.c-lbl{font-size:10px;color:var(--dim);letter-spacing:1px;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:2px;}
.c-val{font-size:13px;font-weight:700;color:#fff;}
.c-val a{color:var(--cyan);text-decoration:none;}
.c-val a:hover{text-decoration:underline;}
.soc-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:9px;margin-top:26px;}
.soc-card{background:var(--card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:11px;
  padding:14px;text-decoration:none;transition:all .2s;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:11px;}
.soc-card:hover{border-color:var(--border2);transform:translateY(-2px);}
.soc-card-icon{font-size:20px;}
.soc-card-label{font-size:12px;font-weight:700;color:#fff;}
.soc-card-handle{font-size:11px;color:var(--muted);}

/* form */
.fg{margin-bottom:14px;}
.fl{display:block;font-size:10px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:1px;text-transform:uppercase;
  color:var(--muted);margin-bottom:6px;}
.fi{width:100%;background:var(--card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:7px;
  padding:11px 13px;color:#fff;font-family:inherit;font-size:13px;outline:none;
  transition:border-color .2s;-webkit-appearance:none;}
.fi:focus{border-color:var(--cyan);box-shadow:0 0 0 3px rgba(0,198,255,.1);}
textarea.fi{min-height:96px;resize:vertical;}
select.fi option{background:var(--card);}
.frow{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:12px;}
.fsub{width:100%;background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--cyan),var(--purple));color:#fff;
  border:none;padding:12px;border-radius:7px;font-family:inherit;font-size:14px;font-weight:700;
  cursor:pointer;transition:opacity .2s;margin-top:4px;}
.fsub:hover{opacity:.88;}
.fnote{font-size:11px;color:var(--dim);text-align:center;margin-top:9px;}
.fsuc{display:none;background:rgba(16,185,129,.1);border:1px solid rgba(16,185,129,.25);
  border-radius:7px;padding:12px;text-align:center;color:#34d399;font-size:13px;margin-top:11px;}
.fsuc.show{display:block;}

/* ── FOOTER ── */
footer{background:var(--bg);border-top:1px solid var(--border);padding:34px 44px;}
.footer-inner{max-width:1160px;margin:0 auto;display:flex;justify-content:space-between;
  align-items:center;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:14px;}
.foot-copy{color:var(--dim);font-size:12px;}
.foot-copy span{color:var(--cyan);}
.foot-links{display:flex;gap:18px;}
.foot-links a{color:var(--muted);text-decoration:none;font-size:12px;transition:color .2s;}
.foot-links a:hover{color:var(--cyan);}
.foot-socs{display:flex;gap:9px;}
.fsoc{width:34px;height:34px;border-radius:7px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.04);
  border:1px solid var(--border);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
  font-size:15px;text-decoration:none;transition:all .2s;}
.fsoc:hover{border-color:var(--cyan);background:rgba(0,198,255,.08);}

/* ── BACK TOP ── */
.back-top{position:fixed;bottom:22px;right:22px;width:42px;height:42px;background:var(--cyan);
  color:#000;border-radius:9px;border:none;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
  font-size:17px;cursor:pointer;z-index:998;opacity:0;transform:translateY(10px);transition:all .2s;}
.back-top.show{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0);}
.back-top:hover{background:var(--cyan2);}

/* ── REVEAL ── */
.reveal{opacity:0;transform:translateY(26px);transition:opacity .65s ease,transform .65s ease;}
.reveal.in{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0);}

/* ── MOBILE ── */
@media(max-width:900px){
  nav{padding:0 18px;}
  .nav-links{display:none;flex-direction:column;position:fixed;top:64px;left:0;right:0;
    background:rgba(4,9,15,.98);padding:18px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);gap:0;}
  .nav-links.open{display:flex;}
  .nav-links li{width:100%;}
  .nav-links a{display:block;padding:12px 0;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);font-size:14px;}
  .nav-hire{display:none;}
  .hbg{display:flex;}
  section{padding:62px 18px;}
  #hero{padding:80px 18px 56px;}
  .hero-inner{grid-template-columns:1fr;gap:36px;}
  .photo-wrap{order:-1;display:flex;justify-content:center;}
  .photo-ring{width:220px;height:220px;}
  .photo-badge,.photo-badge2{display:none;}
  .skills-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr;}
  .ai-card{grid-column:auto;}
  .proj-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr;}
  .about-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr;gap:34px;}
  .contact-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr;gap:36px;}
  .soc-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr;}
  .frow{grid-template-columns:1fr;}
  .footer-inner{flex-direction:column;text-align:center;}
  .foot-links{flex-wrap:wrap;justify-content:center;}
}
@media(max-width:480px){
  .hero-name{font-size:42px;}
  .hero-btns{flex-direction:column;}
}
</style>
</head>
<body>

<!-- NAV -->
<nav id="nav">
  <a href="#hero" class="nav-brand">
    <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Thato">
    <div class="nav-brand-name">Thato <span>Xauka</span></div>
  </a>
  <ul class="nav-links" id="navlinks">

<button class="back-top" id="btt" onclick="window.scrollTo({top:0,behavior:'smooth'})">&#8679;</button>

<script>
// Hamburger
document.getElementById("hbg").addEventListener("click",function(){
  var nl=document.getElementById("navlinks");
  nl.classList.toggle("open");
  var sp=this.querySelectorAll("span");
  if(nl.classList.contains("open")){
    sp[0].style.transform="rotate(45deg) translate(5px,5px)";
    sp[1].style.opacity="0";
    sp[2].style.transform="rotate(-45deg) translate(5px,-5px)";
  }else{sp[0].style.transform="";sp[1].style.opacity="";sp[2].style.transform="";}
});
document.querySelectorAll(".nav-links a").forEach(function(a){
  a.addEventListener("click",function(){document.getElementById("navlinks").classList.remove("open");});
});
// Scroll
window.addEventListener("scroll",function(){
  var btt=document.getElementById("btt");
  btt.classList.toggle("show",window.scrollY>400);
  var cur="";
  document.querySelectorAll("section[id]").forEach(function(s){
    if(window.scrollY>=s.offsetTop-120) cur=s.id;
  });
  document.querySelectorAll(".nav-links a").forEach(function(a){
    a.style.color=a.getAttribute("href")==="#"+cur?"var(--cyan)":"";
  });
});
// Reveal
var obs=new IntersectionObserver(function(entries){
  entries.forEach(function(e){if(e.isIntersecting){e.target.classList.add("in");obs.unobserve(e.target);}});
},{threshold:0.07});
document.querySelectorAll(".reveal").forEach(function(el){obs.observe(el);});
// Form
function submitForm(e){
  e.preventDefault();
  var btn=e.target.querySelector(".fsub");
  btn.textContent="Sending...";btn.style.opacity="0.6";
  setTimeout(function(){
    btn.textContent="✓ Sent!";btn.style.opacity="1";
    document.getElementById("fsuc").classList.add("show");
    e.target.reset();
  },1200);
}
</script>
</body>
</html>
